tasks.subject: Task 1: Drain whole sectors of skipFirst in BuildEpsilonHat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BuildEpsilonHat accepts any WriteOffsetBytes in [-2*SectorSize, +2*SectorSize] without panicking and round-trips byte-exact for clean discs.

**Files:**
- Modify: builder.go (lines 191-195, per-sector loop in BuildEpsilonHat)
- Modify: builder_test.go (extend TestBuilderCleanRoundTrip table; add TestBuildEpsilonHatNoPanicAcrossOffsetRange)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- offsets -SectorSize, -2588, -4704, +2588 round-trip byte-exact via TestBuilderCleanRoundTrip
- 15-offset property test passes (no panic, hat.Len == ScramSize)
- existing TestBuilderCleanRoundTrip sub-tests still pass
- go test ./... passes
- end-to-end smoke check on /roms/final-fantasy-viii/SLUS-00892 succeeds (verify all-three-match, exit 0)

**Verify:** go test -run 'TestBuilder|TestBuildEpsilonHatNoPanic' -v ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["builder.go", "builder_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run 'TestBuilder|TestBuildEpsilonHatNoPanic' -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["-SectorSize round-trips byte-exact", "-2588 round-trips byte-exact", "-4704 round-trips byte-exact", "+2588 round-trips byte-exact", "property test 15 offsets pass without panic", "existing sub-tests still pass", "go test ./... passes", "FF VIII disc 1 pack+verify succeeds"]}
```
